description: Composition Brown sleeveless top made of 95% viscose and 5% spandex, has bead work on the chest and straps and a racer back Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry flat in shade Cool iron if needed do not iron on decorations Perk up your casual outings in this comfortable yet stylish racer back top from van heusen. The racer back adds to your femminity while the viscose fabric keeps you comfy all day. Pair it with your favourite denims or a skirt and sandals. Model Statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
